mapper.sql: addtime, paymenttime, invoicetime, endtime, closetime, total_price, order_total, coupon_id, coupon_price, freight_price, pay_way, user_id, addr_realname, addr_phone, addr_city, address, ip_address, user_ip, order_id, status, express_title, express_name, express_num, buyermessage, buyerrate
mapper.update:
update shop_order set
paymenttime=#{paymenttime},
invoicetime=#{invoicetime},
endtime=#{endtime},
closetime=#{closetime},
addr_realname=#{addr_realname},
addr_phone=#{addr_phone},
addr_city=#{addr_city},
address=#{address},
status=#{status},
express_title=#{express_title},
express_name=#{express_name},
express_num=#{express_num},
buyermessage=#{buyermessage},
buyerrate=#{buyerrate},
pay_way=#{pay_way},
order_id = #{order_id} where order_id = #{order_id}
mapper.select: select t1.addtime, t1.paymenttime, t1.invoicetime, t1.endtime, t1.closetime, order_total, total_price, coupon_id, coupon_price,freight_price, pay_way, addr_realname, addr_phone, addr_city, t1.address, ip_address, user_ip, t1.order_id, t1.status, t1.user_id, t2.username, t2.phone, express_title, express_name, express_num, buyermessage, buyerrate from shop_order t1 left join sys_app_user t2 on t1.user_id=t2.USER_ID where order_id=#{order_id}

select count(1) from shop_order t1 left join sys_app_user t2 on t1.user_id=t2.user_id where 1=1
and (SELECT COUNT(1) from shop_order_detail sd WHERE status=#{status} and sd.order_id=t1.order_id)>0
order by t1.addtime desc
